rows.notes: This row required significant visual override. The description consolidates the main text and the two bracketed notes '{19.9.6}' and '{13.19.6}' into a single description, as they are visually notes/details for the entry, not separate entries with their own amounts. The actual amount '93 pounds, 9 shillings' is clearly visible in the monetary columns for this entry, overriding both extractors' (incorrect) interpretations of the numerical values or their summation.
